report.summary: Built 2 learn guides: Katana Perps IDEX acquisition (on-chain perp DEX with structural yield model, Vault Bridge) and Tokenized Funds institutional DeFi guide (Amundi SAFO, BlackRock BUIDL, TradFi-DeFi convergence). Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Katana acquired IDEX on March 23, 2026, launching Katana Perps — a native perp futures DEX on a Polygon-incubated L2 with a structural yield model (Vault Bridge) instead of token emissions
On-chain perp DEX volume hit $739.5B in Jan 2026; DEX share grew from 2.0% to 10.2% in two years; Hyperliquid commands 70%+ of decentralized perps open interest
Amundi (€2.3T AUM) launched SAFO tokenized fund on March 19, 2026 — $100M on Ethereum + Stellar with Chainlink NAV oracle, structured as SPIKO SICAV under French law
Tokenized securities market estimated at $15B+ in 2026; BlackRock BUIDL ($2B+), Franklin Templeton BENJI ($700M+), Ondo ($800M+) are leading players
Screened 10+ potential topics (MegaETH, Alpenglow, ERC-8183, SEC digital commodities, Bitcoin quantum, Lighter DEX, World Chain, etc.) — all already covered in existing 801 published pages
Sources: BanklessTimes, CoinEdition, Blockhead, GlobeNewsWire, CryptoTimes, CryptoBriefing, TheDefiant, CoinFomania, Blockonomi

sections.title: Content Created
items: Katana Perps guide (~2,800 words): 7 sections covering IDEX acquisition rationale, structural yield/Vault Bridge model, how Katana Perps works (4-step flow), $739B on-chain perps market context with key metrics, vertical integration strategy comparison table, Katana vs Hyperliquid vs dYdX comparison table, 4 risk categories, 5 FAQs

Tokenized Funds guide (~3,200 words): 7 sections covering what tokenized funds are (TradFi vs tokenized comparison), Amundi SAFO deep-dive with 6 key metrics, 5-step on-chain mechanics flow, major players comparison table (BlackRock/Franklin Templeton/Amundi/Ondo/Securitize), 4 use cases (treasury/collateral/settlement/compliance), DeFi composability stack, 5 risk categories, 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Katana Perps: title 'Katana Perps Guide 2026: How the IDEX Acquisition Created a Full-Stack Perp DEX', target keywords 'katana perps, IDEX acquisition, structural yield perps', Article + FAQ schemas (5 FAQs), 2 internal links (/ecosystem/hyperliquid, /learn/perpetual-dex-guide-2026)

Tokenized Funds: title 'Tokenized Funds Guide 2026: How TradFi Giants Are Bringing $15B+ in Assets On-Chain', target keywords 'tokenized funds, institutional DeFi, Amundi SAFO', Article + FAQ schemas (6 FAQs), 5 internal links (/learn/tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026, /ecosystem/aave, /tools/portfolio-tracker, /learn/mica-eu-crypto-regulation-guide, /learn/sec-digital-commodities-classification-guide)
Both pages: OpenGraph article type, Breadcrumb navigation, StructuredData component with combined Article + FAQ schemas, published dates set to 2026-03-25

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: No new interactive components required — both are educational learn guides using existing Breadcrumb and StructuredData components with static content, comparison tables, step flows, and info boxes

sections.title: Publishing
items: Both slugs added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
TypeScript check passed — no errors in new page files (only pre-existing @types/web conflicts in node_modules)
